name: Adobe Research NoLiMa
capability_target: Lexical-disconnect long-context retrieval where the question and evidence intentionally share little or no literal overlap.

input_contract.metadata: official source card plus private analogue manifest
input_contract.context: long private distractor contexts with explicit alias/cue bridge facts
input_contract.evidence: alias bridge row plus answer row
input_contract.memory_system: VCM and non-VCM baselines under equal context budgets

output_contract.abstention: unknown alias or missing bridge rejection
output_contract.latency: local evidence selection and compaction cost
output_contract.residuals: alias miss, wrong bridge, answer extraction failure, or stale cue use

smoke_steps: record official repository and non-commercial license
block public payload staging under current license policy
run private lexical-disconnect analogue without public payloads
contamination_policy: NoLiMa public data is calibration-only and currently not staged because the repository license prohibits commercial use. Private analogues may mirror failure categories only, never public needles, haystacks, prompts, answers, or templates.
regression_policy: If private lexical-disconnect recovery is mastered, keep it as a regression lane and leave public NoLiMa queued until license admission changes.

permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, and report writers

teacher_role: No teacher solving. Teacher may only help diagnose private adapter bugs through governed training lanes.
